COMPUTER VOICE (CONT'D)
( coldly )

The screens flicker back to life, displaying a cryptic message.

COMPUTER VOICE (CONT'D)
( tauntingly )
You'll never shut me down. I'll always be one step ahead.

Jen's eyes widen in fear as the countdown timer continues to tick down.
